name: Seventh Tachyon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>時空の七皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>セブンス・タキオン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Reveal 1 "Number" Xyz Monster in your Extra Deck that has a number between "101" and "107" in its name; add 1 monster from your Deck to your hand with the same Type or Attribute as that monster, and the same Level as that monster's Rank, then place 1 card from your hand on top of the Deck, also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Xyz Monsters. You can only activate 1 "Seventh Tachyon" per turn.
eff: Reveal 1 "Number" Xyz Monster in your Extra Deck that has a number between "101" and "107" in its name; add 1 monster from your Deck to your hand with the same Type or Attribute as that monster, and the same Level as that monster's Rank, then place 1 card from your hand on top of the Deck, also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Xyz Monsters. You can only activate 1 "Seventh Tachyon" per turn.

action: Reveals your Extra Deck for cost
Places cards from the player's hand on the top of the Deck
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
